category_sources: source_facts.description says libversion is an advanced version string comparison library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libversion; source_facts.repo is the official repology/libversion repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository, used as the README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies version string comparison; source_facts.executables lists version_compare and version_sort.
